Our Adventures

Oahu Kayak & E-Bike Tours

From the iconic Mokulua Islands to the tranquil waters of Kaneohe Bay. Guided and self-guided adventures for every skill level.

moderate
5 hours

Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Paddle to the iconic Mokulua Islands off Kailua Beach
  • Explore seabird sanctuary and tide pools
  • Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles
$149 per person
Book Now
easy
3–4 hours

Kailua E-Bike Kau Kau Guided Adventure

Kailua Town, Oahu

  • Guided e-bike food tour through Kailua Town and the windward coast
  • Stop at 3–4 local eateries for authentic Hawaiian flavors
  • Cruise scenic coastal paths — the e-bike does the work!
$129 per person
Book Now
moderate
5 hours

Mokulua Twin Islands Guided Kayak Tour

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Our signature guided tour to the iconic Mokulua Islands
  • Land on Moku Nui and hike to the summit for 360° views
  • Explore Queen's Bath — a natural tide pool on the island
$169 per person
Book Now
easy
4–5 hours

Popoia Island Guided Kayak Tour

Kailua Beach, Oahu

  • Guided paddle to Popoia Island (Flat Island) — Kailua's hidden gem
  • Snorkel with Hawaiian green sea turtles in protected waters
  • Explore a native seabird sanctuary with your expert guide
$149 per person
Book Now

Not Sure Which Tour Is Right for You?

Our guides are happy to help. Call or email us — we'll match you with the perfect adventure.

📞 (808) 498-1894 ✉️ Email Us

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
